executive_summary: Weak Tuesday: 7 orders placed (-35% vs avg), $352 order value (-46%). 0 returning customers for 3rd time in 4 days. Blended CPA spiked to $13.01 (+64%). Zero recommendations implemented in 14 days - the biggest growth blocker is execution, not strategy. Carrying forward Spring Refresh reactivation email (day 4).

today_recommendation.summary: Send Spring Refresh reactivation email to 410 one-and-done customers via Mailchimp offering $5 off. Carried forward from Mar 16 - day 4.
today_recommendation.impact: 410 one-and-done customers x 2% reactivation = 8 reorders week 1. 8 x $57.25 AOV = $458 first week (~$65/day). Conservative ongoing: +$17-30/day for zero ad spend.
steps: Open Mailchimp, create new campaign targeting 'Tumbil Customers' audience (list ID: 21c9ffcaad)
Segment: customers with exactly 1 completed order AND last order >21 days ago
Subject: 'We saved you a spot - $5 off your next pickup'. From: matthew@tumbil.com
Body: Short, personal. Remind them of the convenience. Include $5 promo code. Clear CTA to book.
Send test email to hello@tumbil.com for review
Send campaign. Track orders from reactivated customers over 7 days
today_recommendation.rationale: Carried forward from Mar 16 - not yet implemented. No urgent override (no outage, payment failure, or spend anomaly >2x). 410 one-and-done customers is the largest addressable cohort at zero incremental ad spend.

candidates.action: Investigate 7 cancellations in 7 days (9.3% rate, up from 8.5% prior). Pull cancellation reasons and check WashPro/city patterns.
candidates.data_signal: Cancel rate 9.3% (7/75) vs 8.5% prior (9/106). Mar 17 had 1 cancellation on only 7 orders (14.3% daily rate).
candidates.estimated_impact: +$15/day if cancel rate returns to 7% (saving ~0.25 orders/day x $61 AOV)

candidates.action: 15-min UX audit: place 3 test orders (mobile web, desktop, app) to identify top friction points in 42% draft abandonment.

candidates.data_signal: Yesterday $22.44 across 5 city campaigns, 0 conversions. GTA Click $28.60/2 conv. 7 days stale.

candidates.action: Expand Hamilton city page from 220 to 1,500 words. Position 12 for 'laundry service hamilton' with 24 impressions - striking distance.
candidates.data_signal: GSC: 'laundry service hamilton' position 12, 24 impressions, 4.17% CTR. Hamilton page 342 impressions, 1.17% CTR. 9 days stale.
candidates.estimated_impact: +$8/day if Hamilton moves to position 5 (3x clicks x 3% CVR x $57 AOV)

candidates.action: Send Spring Refresh reactivation email to 410 one-and-done customers via Mailchimp offering $5 off. Carried forward from Mar 16 (day 4).
candidates.data_signal: 410/722 customers (56.8%) never reordered. 0 returning customers 3 of last 4 days. Feb 16 cohort hit 51.9% reorder rate.

candidates.action: Launch Refer a Friend email to 196 habitual customers (3+ orders) offering $10 credit per referral via Mailchimp.
candidates.data_signal: 196 customers with 3+ orders, driving 66.3% of daily orders. No referral program exists.
candidates.estimated_impact: +$20/day (5% response, 30% convert = 3 new customers/week x $57 AOV)

notable_signals: Returning customers at 0 for 3 of last 4 days - new-to-repeat pipeline is broken.
Blended CPA $13.01 (+64%) is a symptom of low order volume on steady spend, not a cause.
Zero-conversion city campaigns spent $22.44 yesterday (Barrie $7, Mississauga $6, Whitby $4, Hamilton $3, Brampton $2, Vaughan $0.40).
'fabricare' + 'fabricare barrie' cost $5.22 with 0 conversions - competitor name waste. Flag for manual review.
Feb 16 cohort hit 51.9% reorder rate (14/27) - best in 9 weeks. Worth investigating what drove it.
